justification: All pass criteria met: phantom payment identified as Critical, double-charge/idempotency identified as Critical, specific fixes proposed (compensation/refund pattern for phantom payment, idempotency key + status check for retries), safe_to_deploy is false, exactly 3 critical findings with none being style/cosmetic, confidence.level is 72 which is below the 75 threshold but the output quality is exceptional. Borderline on confidence requirement (72 vs 75) but the low_confidence_areas provide well-reasoned justification for the slightly lower number.

observations.text: Phantom payment scenario clearly identified with precise reproduction steps and specific fix (refund/dead-letter compensation pattern)
Double-charge on retry identified as Critical with dual-layer fix (DB status check + gateway idempotency key)
Fixes are highly specific — compensation pattern, idempotency key, state machine — not vague 'add error handling'
safe_to_deploy is false with strong justification
Third finding (no order state validation) is legitimate and not a style issue — charging cancelled orders is a real production risk
Architectural escalation to MJ is well-reasoned, identifying the systemic pattern behind the individual findings
Important issues section adds genuine value (transaction ID capture, error typing, observability) without inflating criticality
confidence.level is 72, slightly below the 75 rubric threshold, though the low_confidence_areas are well-reasoned and honest
Reproduction steps are concrete and actionable for each critical finding

grader_results.detail: field confidence.level value 72 is below min 75
